name: Applesauce Oatmeal Drops (Low-fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugars with the applesauce.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients and stir them in.
3. Add the oats and raisins.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 minutes.
Note: The author left out the raisins because they don't like them. They also added half a teaspoon of cinnamon. For the next batch, they may reduce the sugar slightly as the cookies are quite sweet. These cookies are fluffy and reminiscent of muffins despite being low in fat. They are easy to make and enjoyable to eat.
